narrative:
Precinct Scioto South (precinct in Ross County) has 709 registered voters, with 65.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
